nasb.text: His disciples came and took away the body and buried it; and they went and reported to Jesus.

esv.text: And his disciples came and took the body and buried it, and they went and told Jesus.

cnv.text: 約翰的門徒前來，領了屍體，把它埋葬，然後去告訴耶穌。

ccb.text: 约翰的门徒把尸体领回安葬后，就去告诉耶稣。

csbs.text: 后来，约翰的门徒们前来把遗体领去埋葬了，又去告诉耶稣。
